basics.name: prefix
basics.label: Resource Prefix
basics.toolTip: A short prefix for all Azure resource names (2-8 lowercase alphanumeric characters or hyphens). For example, 'knowz' creates resources like 'knowz-api', 'knowz-sql', etc.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 2-8 characters: lowercase letters, digits, or hyphens. Must start with a letter and end with a letter or digit.

elements.name: sqlAdminUsername
elements.label: SQL Admin Username
elements.toolTip: Administrator username for the Azure SQL Server. Cannot be 'admin', 'sa', or other reserved names.

constraints.validationMessage: Must start with a letter. Only letters and digits allowed. Max 128 characters. Cannot be 'admin' or 'sa'.

elements.name: sqlAdminPassword
elements.toolTip: Password for the SQL Server administrator account. Must be at least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 12-128 characters with at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 digit, and 1 special character (@$!%*?&).

elements.name: adminPassword
elements.toolTip: Password for the Knowz application SuperAdmin account (used to log in to the Web UI). Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 8-128 characters with at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 digit, and 1 special character (@$!%*?&).

elements.name: deployOpenAI
elements.label: Deploy Azure OpenAI
elements.toolTip: Deploy a new Azure OpenAI resource with chat and embedding models. Select 'No' to use your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

elements.name: externalOpenAiEndpoint
elements.label: External OpenAI Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Your OpenAI-compatible API endpoint URL (e.g., https://your-openai.openai.azure.com/).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.

elements.name: externalOpenAiKey
elements.toolTip: API key for your external OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

elements.name: caDeploymentName
elements.label: Chat Model Deployment Name
elements.toolTip: The deployment name for the chat completion model on your external endpoint.

elements.name: caEmbeddingDeploymentName
elements.label: Embedding Model Deployment Name
elements.toolTip: The deployment name for the embedding model on your external endpoint.

elements.name: searchSku
elements.label: AI Search SKU
elements.toolTip: The pricing tier for Azure AI Search. 'free' has limited indexes and storage. 'basic' is recommended for production.

elements.name: searchLocation
elements.label: AI Search Location
elements.toolTip: Azure region for AI Search. Defaults to the selected resource group location. Override if the Search SKU is not available in your selected region.

elements.name: deployDocumentIntelligence
elements.label: Deploy Document Intelligence
elements.toolTip: Deploy Azure Document Intelligence (Form Recognizer) for advanced document extraction — scanned PDFs, images, and legacy Office formats. Select 'No' to use your own endpoint or skip this feature.

elements.name: externalDocIntelEndpoint
elements.label: External Document Intelligence Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Your Document Intelligence API endpoint URL (e.g., https://your-docintel.cognitiveservices.azure.com/).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.

elements.name: externalDocIntelKey
elements.toolTip: API key for your external Document Intelligence endpoint.

elements.name: deployVision
elements.label: Deploy Azure AI Vision
elements.toolTip: Deploy Azure AI Vision (Computer Vision) for image and diagram analysis. Select 'No' to use your own endpoint or skip this feature.

elements.name: externalVisionEndpoint
elements.label: External Vision Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Your Azure AI Vision API endpoint URL (e.g., https://your-vision.cognitiveservices.azure.com/).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.

elements.name: externalVisionKey
elements.toolTip: API key for your external Azure AI Vision endpoint.

elements.name: imageTag
elements.label: Image Tag
elements.toolTip: The container image tag to deploy (e.g., 'latest', 'v1.0.0').

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid container image tag.

options.text: Container images are hosted on GitHub Container Registry (ghcr.io). If images are public, no credentials are needed. If private, provide your GitHub username and a Personal Access Token with 'read:packages' scope.

elements.name: registryUsername
elements.label: GHCR Username (optional)
elements.toolTip: GitHub username or organization for GHCR authentication. Leave empty for public images.

elements.name: registryPassword
elements.toolTip: GitHub Personal Access Token with 'read:packages' scope. Leave empty for public images.

elements.name: deployKeyVault
elements.label: Deploy Key Vault
elements.toolTip: Deploy Azure Key Vault to store secrets. Recommended for production deployments.

elements.name: deployMonitoring
elements.label: Deploy Monitoring
elements.toolTip: Deploy Log Analytics workspace and Application Insights for monitoring and diagnostics.

options.text: Estimated monthly cost at basic SKUs: ~$90-100/month. Breakdown: SQL Server Basic (~$5), Azure AI Search Basic (~$70), Storage (~$1), Container Apps (~$10-15), Key Vault (~$0.03/operation), Log Analytics (~$2-5). Azure OpenAI is pay-per-use based on token consumption.
